name: Canaan Valley National Wildlife Refuge
notes: 16,613 acres; largest high-elevation wetland complex in eastern US; birding, wildlife observation, hunting; Tucker County
visitor_data_notes: Visitor center figure only; total refuge use (hunting, wildlife viewing, hiking) likely higher

name: Dolly Sods Wilderness
notes: 17,776 acres; high-altitude heath barrens, WWII-era bombing range; Section 1 area; 0.7mi from corridor
visitor_data_notes: Trailhead register counts; gradual rise for a decade then COVID-era surge; ongoing monitoring

name: Otter Creek Wilderness
notes: 20,698 acres; Section 1/2 corridor; old-growth hemlock, remote backcountry; Tucker/Randolph counties

name: Laurel Fork North Wilderness
notes: 6,055 acres; Randolph County; 9.5mi of trails along Laurel Fork river; Section 2 area

name: Laurel Fork South Wilderness
notes: 5,784 acres; Randolph County; 9mi of trails; separated from North by County Route 40; Section 2 area

name: Spruce Knob-Seneca Rocks NRA

visitor_data_notes: Estimate for Seneca Rocks climbing/visitor area only; broader NRA part of Mon NF 3M total

name: Cranberry Wilderness
